title: Integration Developer (Temp)
description: Integration Developer (Temp) The Barbados Light & Power Company Bridgetown Not disclosed Temporary full-time Updated 17/02/2026 Human Resources Apply Now Share Share this job Facebook Twitter Report This Job Save Save The Integration Developer (Temp) will be assigned to focus on the development, testing and implementation of integration components to support the tasks required for the successful implementation of various projects. The Barbados Light & Power Company Limited is inviting applications from suitably qualified individuals to fill the temporary position of Integration Developer. Reporting to the Integration Architect, the Integration Developer will be assigned to focus on the development, testing and implementation of integration components to support the tasks required for the successful implementation of various projects. The successful candidate will be required to: Configure and maintain integrations between customer-facing forms and internal service management platforms. Assist in the development and implementation of customer messaging workflows and service automation. Conduct user acceptance testing (UAT) and system integration testing (SIT) for customer service tools and core business systems. Test and validate LLM solutions used for customer and business support processes. Assist with documenting integration workflows for ERP-related initiatives. Support development and configuration activities for ERP integration components. Assist with documenting and supporting integration workflows for enterprise data platforms. The ideal candidate should possess: ▪ Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology or any related discipline. ▪ Basic understanding of software development principles and methodologies. ▪ Experience with programming languages such as Java, Python or SQL Ref: Integration Developer (Temp) Apply Now

title: Development Support Analyst – Insurance Application Services
description: Development Support Analyst – Insurance Application Services Sagicor Group Jamaica Ltd. Kingston and St. Andrew Not disclosed Permanent full-time Updated 16/02/2026 SGJ TAU Log in or register to apply Share Share this job Facebook Twitter Report This Job Save Save While we appreciate all applicants, only applications received via Sagicor's career portal https://career4.successfactors.com/career?company=sagicorfinP2 will be considered. "Looking for a diverse and rewarding career? If you're looking to grow your career within a stable and growing financial services company, then Sagicor may be right for you!" Sagicor Group Jamaica Limited is seeking a suitable candidate to join our Group Application Services team in the capacity of: Development Support Analyst – Insurance Application Services Investigate, troubleshoot and resolve technical issues related to software applications and systems. Work closely with development teams, stakeholders, and end-users to identify and fix problems, ensuring minimal downtime and optimal system performance. Location: Kingston As a Development Support Analyst – Insurance Application Services, you will: Evaluate and undertake impact analysis on major technical options and takes a leading role in proposing technical solutions within area of expertise. Take responsibility for investigative work to seek effective business solutions for assigned projects. Utilize business experience and skills to assess and advise on the practicability of alternatives. Take responsibility as needed for the detailed specification and modelling of recommended solutions. Plan, arrange and control meetings, workshops, and relations with client/user staff during system investigations and throughout subsequent development work. Take technical responsibility for most stages of the life cycle for software development of all types of systems. Prescribe standards for the terms and symbols used in program documentation. Assist to set guidelines for the preparation of policies and procedures manuals. Coordinate the preparation of detailed documentation on the operation of programs for users and computer operators. Undertake all work in accordance with required technical and quality standards and using appropriate methods and tools to achieve well-engineered product. Recommend program changes to increase operating efficiency or to adapt to new systems requirements. Modify application software to include corrective maintenance. Implement version control and release management procedures, as per change management policy. Apply automated and manual tools including ‘black box’ and ‘white box’ testing, to test and evaluate systems and networks under development. Monitor all activities against plan, providing regular and accurate reports to senior management, and client/user management as appropriate. Maintain contact with larger software and hardware vendors for support and to remain informed of developments within the industry. Communicate with core software vendors, to develop system designs into specific functionality requirements. Perform other job-related duties assigned from time to time. What do you need? Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent qualification from a recognized tertiary institution. A minimum of two (1) years working experience in IT related disciplines. Strong analytical/critical thinking skills. Results oriented. Effective interpersonal and communication skills. A team player. Sound decision-making skills. Working knowledge of programming languages, such as COBOL, TSO, JCSL, CICS C#, SQL, CSS, HTML, JavaScript, DB2 and MSSQL. Familiarity with Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) methodologies. Ability to design and develop moderately complex programs and programs modification. Experience in application systems integration of average complexity. If this role is of interest to you, kindly submit an application via Sagicor's career portal no later than February 20, 2026. While we appreciate all applications, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Ref: Development Support Analyst – Insurance Applicatio Log in or register to apply

title: Sagicor Group Jamaica Ltd.
description: Sagicor Group Jamaica Ltd. Who We Are • Sagicor Life Jamaica Limited (Sagicor) is the foremost life insurance company in Jamaica. The company commenced operations in 1970 as Life of Jamaica Limited, the first Jamaican-owned life insurance company and was the first life insurance company to be listed on the Jamaica Stock Exchange (JSE). Since its inception, Sagicor has gained a solid reputation as a pacesetter, innovator and leader in the Caribbean life insurance industry. The company has been the market leader among life insurance companies in Jamaica.
